$comment: Byte-identical tool-permission surface across all arms (design §4). The mcp__repogrammar__* entry is inert in A0 (no server configured). Bash/WebFetch/WebSearch/Task are denied so the pilot task environment is offline and leak-free; grading runs offline in the harness, so the agent never needs Bash. For the full grid, the design permits a pinned Bash(build/test) allowlist; the pilot deliberately denies Bash and documents that deviation.
